evals.prompt:
Validate the structure of this paper outline:

Table of Contents:
1. Abstract
2. Related Work
3. Methodology
4. Results
5. Conclusion
6. References
evals.expected_output: JSONL identifying missing sections: Introduction (critical), Discussion (important), and incorrect ordering of Related Work (should follow Introduction)

evals.prompt:
Check this paper's heading hierarchy:

# 1. Introduction
## 1.1 Problem Statement
### 1.1.1 Motivation
# 2. Methods
### 2.1 Algorithm Description
## 2.2 Implementation
# 3. Results
evals.expected_output: JSONL flagging heading_skip issues (# to ### without ##) and heading_level_inconsistent (Methods section jumps to ### instead of ##)

evals.prompt:
Review this paper structure for completeness:

1. Abstract - Present
2. Introduction - Present
3. Related Work - Present
4. Methods - Present
5. Experiments/Results - Present
6. Discussion - Present
7. Conclusion - Present
8. Bibliography - Present (all in-text citations matched)

Table of Contents matches all sections. Headings follow ## ### #### hierarchy consistently.
evals.expected_output: JSONL with minimal issues (well-structured); possibly minor formatting notes
